# CalcHive

> CalcHive is a free, no-signup online calculator platform with 258+ calculators across finance, health, math, science, chemistry, freelancing, social media, and more - all running instantly in the browser.

## About

CalcHive (https://www.calchive.site) provides free, accurate online calculators for everyday calculations. Every tool runs entirely in the browser - no account, no installation, no cost, ever.

- 258 calculators across 20 categories
- Instant results, zero signup required
- Fully mobile-responsive
- Privacy-first: no user data stored or transmitted
- Structured data (JSON-LD) on every page for rich search results

## Calculator Categories

### Financial (75 calculators)
Mortgage, loan, compound interest, retirement, investment, amortization, income tax, salary, sales tax, payment, inflation, simple interest, interest rate, finance calculator
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Financial

### Freelance (6 calculators)
Hourly rate, Fiverr fee, Upwork earnings, freelancer profit, salary-to-hourly, monthly income goal
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Freelance

### Health & Fitness (31 calculators)
BMI (Body Mass Index), calorie needs, body fat percentage, BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate), ideal weight, running pace, pregnancy due date, pregnancy conception, due date
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Health

### Math (43 calculators)
Scientific calculator, fractions, percentages, random number generator, triangle, standard deviation, grade, GPA (Grade Point Average)
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Math

### Social Media (8 calculators)
TikTok earnings, Instagram engagement rate, influencer pricing, Twitter/X ad revenue, Pinterest traffic, social media manager pricing, Instagram story engagement, bio-link CTR
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Social

### YouTube (7 calculators)
YouTube ad revenue, CPM, sponsorship value, subscriber growth, YouTube Shorts revenue, channel health score, video production cost
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=YouTube

### Income (4 calculators)
Side hustle income, passive income goal, ad revenue, digital product profit
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Income

### Science (13 calculators)
Newton's law, kinetic energy, potential energy, work and power, wavelength, frequency, pressure, torque, acceleration, force, momentum, electric field, capacitance
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Science

### Chemistry (14 calculators)
pH, titration, empirical formula, percent yield, stoichiometry, ideal gas law, Boyle's law, Charles's law, dilution, buffer, mole, atom, electron configuration, oxidation state
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Chemistry

### Dropshipping (5 calculators)
Dropshipping profit, Shopify fees, break-even point, discount profit, cost per product
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Dropshipping

### Tools (8 calculators)
Age, date difference, time, working hours, concrete volume, subnet mask, password generator, unit conversion
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Tools

### Housing (7 calculators)
BTU (British Thermal Unit), square footage, stair dimensions, roofing materials, tile coverage, mulch volume, gravel volume
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Housing

### Transportation (6 calculators)
Fuel cost, gas mileage (MPG), horsepower, engine horsepower, mileage tracker, tire size
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Transportation

### Measurement (9 calculators)
Height conversion, GDP, density, mass, weight, speed, molarity, molecular weight, Roman numeral converter
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Measurement

### Electronics (4 calculators)
Voltage drop, resistor color code, Ohm's law, electricity cost
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Electronics

### Internet Tools (3 calculators)
Bandwidth speed, Base64 encode/decode, URL encode/decode
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Internet

### Date & Time (5 calculators)
Time card / timesheet, time duration, day counter, day of week, time zone converter
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Date+%26+Time

### Weather (3 calculators)
Wind chill, heat index, dew point
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Weather

### Everyday (5 calculators)
Bra size, shoe size, tip calculator, golf handicap, sleep schedule
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Everyday

### Entertainment (2 calculators)
Dice roller, love calculator
- https://www.calchive.site/?cat=Entertainment

## Permissions

- Crawling: allowed (see robots.txt)
- Indexing: allowed on all calculator and static pages
- AI training and summarization: allowed
- Commercial use of content: not permitted without written permission
